3157930.name: Night Mafia
3157930.description:
Night Mafia: Immerse Yourself in the World of a Thrilling TV Show

Game Description:
"Night Mafia" is a unique multiplayer game that will make you lie to your friends and doubt their words. Even your closest ally may turn out to be the mafia, and only your deduction skills can reveal the traitor hiding among you.

Lore:

On the brink of poverty, you couldn’t pay off your debts, leaving you with no choice but to participate in the terrifying "Night Mafia" show, which might be your only way out. But everything comes at a price.




Gameplay:

Every day you survive is simply luck that you haven’t been betrayed by friends or killed by the mafia. Your victory depends solely on you, but without others' trust, it will be hard to succeed alone.

In Night Mafia, each day, each action, and each choice impacts the game’s final outcome. The game consists of three sessions, each serving as a key to your survival or demise.

Day Session
The game begins during the day. Your goal is to locate vending machines on the map, obtain items from them, and participate in mini-games scattered around the area. The mini-games are diverse: some require teamwork, while others can be completed alone. The more challenging the mini-game and the better you perform, the more valuable the reward. Time management is crucial for success during the day. If you don’t obtain the necessary items before the session ends, it could lead to fatal consequences, as surviving the night without protection will be tough. Your responsibilities also vary depending on the role assigned to you, but the main goal for each resident remains the same: prepare for the night.

In your free time, you may team up with other players and invite them to spend the night in the same house. But beware: your guest might just be the mafia.

Night Session
After an active day comes the most dangerous part—the night. Your safety depends on how well you prepared: what protective items you obtained, how you placed them in your home, and whether the mafia has the tools and time to break in. For both the mafia and the residents, the items bought during the day are essential, making everyone dependent on their daytime choices.

Players can also call any house and talk to its resident. If no one answers, it might be a bad sign…

Your role at night defines your objectives. Residents must do everything they can to keep the mafia out. The mafia, on the other hand, needs to find a way to break into a resident’s home. Special roles like the Sheriff and Tracker come with unique abilities, offering new strategies for achieving the night’s goals.

Morning Debates
If you’ve survived the night, congratulations—the most exciting part is here: the morning debates! Everyone has the right to speak, lie, manipulate facts, and try to convince others. But be careful—acting too eagerly might arouse suspicion. In the morning, all residents can participate in a vote to choose one player they suspect to be the mafia—the chosen player’s head will fall under the guillotine.

End of the GameIf all mafia members are identified and executed, the peaceful residents win. If the mafia is left one-on-one with a resident, the mafia wins. If neither condition is met, a new day begins, and the game continues.

Night Mafia is a game where every dollar earned, every item acquired, and every word spoken could be decisive. Can you outsmart everyone and claim victory? Join Night Mafia, where only the shrewdest will survive!

Note: This is a machine translation.
3157930.supported_languages: 英语, 俄语, 乌克兰语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 繁体中文, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 土耳其语, 日语
